---
name: New vulnerability check / Nuclei template
about: Propose a new detection capability
title: '[check] '
labels: enhancement, new-check
assignees: ''
---

**What does this check detect?**
<!-- e.g. "Exposed .git directories on web servers" -->

**CVE / reference**
<!-- CVE-XXXX-XXXX or link to advisory -->

**CVSS score (if known)**


**Tech stack / affected software**
<!-- e.g. Apache 2.4.x, WordPress 5.x, etc. -->

**Detection approach**
<!-- How would you detect this? HTTP response pattern, Nuclei template, custom logic? -->

**False positive risk**
<!-- Low / Medium / High — explain why -->

**Can you submit a PR?**
<!-- Yes / No — if yes, great! See CONTRIBUTING.md -->
